center.name: 天宁岛
center.summary: 天宁岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Mariana swiftlet，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The swiftlet is found in Guam as well as in Saipan and Aguiguan in the Northern Mariana Islands, and is locally extinct on Rota and Tinian

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The swiftlet is found in Guam as well as in Saipan and Aguiguan in the Northern Mariana Islands, and is locally extinct on Rota and Tinian
